description.en_US: Consume the Hacker News API powered by Algolia
description.zh_Hans: 使用 Algolia 驱动的 Hacker News API

tools.name: search-hacker-news

description.en_US: Search stories and comments from Hacker News
description.zh_Hans: 搜索 Hacker News 中的文章和评论

llm_description.en_US: Search query string for filtering Hacker News stories. Supports Algolia search syntax
llm_description.zh_Hans: 用于搜索 Hacker News 文章的查询字符串，支持 Algolia 搜索语法

hint.en_US: The keyword for filtering the results of the query
hint.zh_Hans: 用于过滤查询结果的关键词

llm_description.en_US: Optional zero-based page number for Algolia pagination.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 可选的 Algolia 分页页码，从 0 开始。

hint.en_US: Zero-based result page to fetch from the Hacker News Algolia API
hint.zh_Hans: 从 Hacker News Algolia API 获取的结果页码，从 0 开始

llm_description.en_US: Maximum number of search results to return per page. Range: 1-100
llm_description.zh_Hans: 每页返回搜索结果的最大数量。范围：1-100

hint.en_US: Maximum number of results to return per page
hint.zh_Hans: 每页返回结果的最大数量

llm_description.en_US: When true, calls the Hacker News Algolia search_by_date endpoint instead of search.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 启用后调用 Hacker News Algolia 的 search_by_date 端点，而不是 search。

hint.en_US: Use Algolia's search_by_date endpoint to sort by newest first
hint.zh_Hans: 使用 Algolia 的 search_by_date 端点按最新优先排序

llm_description.en_US: Filter results by one or more Hacker News item tags: story, comment, poll, pollopt, show_hn, ask_hn, or front_page
llm_description.zh_Hans: 按一个或多个 Hacker News 标签过滤结果：story、comment、poll、pollopt、show_hn、ask_hn 或 front_page

hint.en_US: Optionally narrow results to one or more Hacker News item types
hint.zh_Hans: 可选地将结果限制为一个或多个 Hacker News 条目类型

llm_description.en_US: Filter results by one or more Hacker News item tags: story, comment, poll, pollopt, show_hn, ask_hn, or front_page
llm_description.zh_Hans: 按一个或多个 Hacker News 标签过滤结果：story、comment、poll、pollopt、show_hn、ask_hn 或 front_page

llm_description.en_US: Optional Hacker News username filter. This is mapped to the Algolia tag syntax author_USERNAME.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 可选的 Hacker News 用户名过滤条件，会映射为 Algolia 的 author_USERNAME 标签语法。

hint.en_US: Filter results to items by a specific Hacker News username
hint.zh_Hans: 将结果过滤为某个指定的 Hacker News 用户

llm_description.en_US: Optional Hacker News story ID filter. This is mapped to the Algolia tag syntax story_ID.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 可选的 Hacker News 故事 ID 过滤条件，会映射为 Algolia 的 story_ID 标签语法。

hint.en_US: Filter results to a specific Hacker News story ID context
hint.zh_Hans: 将结果过滤到某个特定的 Hacker News 故事 ID 上下文

llm_description.en_US: Optional raw Algolia numericFilters query string, such as filters on created_at_i, points, or num_comments.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 可选的原始 Algolia numericFilters 查询字符串，例如针对 created_at_i、points 或 num_comments 的过滤。

hint.en_US: Advanced Algolia numericFilters string, for example created_at_i>1700000000 or points>100
hint.zh_Hans: 高级 Algolia numericFilters 字符串，例如 created_at_i>1700000000 或 points>100

tools.skill:
# hacker-news / search-hacker-news

Search Hacker News stories and comments through the Algolia API.

## Input Parameters

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `results_per_page` | `integer` | no | `100` | Maximum number of results to return per page. Range: 1-100. |
| `search_by_date` | `boolean` | no | `false` | When `true`, calls Algolia's `search_by_date` endpoint instead of `search`. |
| `keyword` | `string` | no | `""` | Search query text. |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no | `[]` | Optional Hacker News tags. Allowed values: `story`, `comment`, `poll`, `pollopt`, `show_hn`, `ask_hn`, `front_page`. |
| `page` | `integer` | no | `0` | Zero-based result page for Algolia pagination. |
| `author` | `string` | no | `""` | Optional Hacker News username. Internally mapped to Algolia tag syntax `author_USERNAME`. |
| `story_id` | `integer` | no | - | Optional Hacker News story ID. Internally mapped to Algolia tag syntax `story_ID`. |
| `numeric_filters` | `string` | no | `""` | Optional raw Algolia `numericFilters` string, such as `created_at_i>1700000000` or `points>100`. |

### Example Input

```json
{
  "keyword": "YC",
  "tags": ["story"],
  "search_by_date": true,
  "results_per_page": 1,
  "page": 0
}
```

## Credential

- No credential is required.

## Success Output

```json
{
  "query": "YC",
  "tags": ["story"],
  "total": 28560,
  "count": 1,
  "items": [
    {
      "id": "47612289",
      "type": "story",
      "title": "Please stop flagging everything going against Israel",
      "url": null,
      "author": "throwaw12",
      "created_at": "2026-04-02T10:03:02Z",
      "points": 5,
      "comment_count": 3,
      "text": "Another post got flagged: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47612053",
      "story_id": 47612289
    }
  ]
}
```

### Output Notes

- `query` echoes the search text sent to Algolia.
- `tags` includes only the user-selected Hacker News tag filters, not derived helper tags such as `author_USERNAME`.
- `items` are normalized Algolia hits with common fields such as `id`, `type`, `title`, `author`, `points`, `comment_count`, and `text`.

tools.name: get-hacker-news-article

display_name.zh_Hans: 获取 Hacker News 文章

description.en_US: Fetch a Hacker News item by ID, optionally including comments
description.zh_Hans: 根据 ID 获取 Hacker News 条目，并可选择包含其评论树

llm_description.en_US: The unique identifier of a Hacker News item to fetch. Numeric ID from the URL
llm_description.zh_Hans: 要获取的 Hacker News 条目的唯一标识符，URL 中的数字 ID

hint.en_US: The ID of the Hacker News item to be returned
hint.zh_Hans: 要返回的 Hacker News 条目 ID

llm_description.en_US: When true, includes the full comment tree in the response. When false, returns only the normalized item metadata
llm_description.zh_Hans: 启用时返回完整评论树，关闭时仅返回标准化后的条目元数据

hint.en_US: Whether to include the full comment tree for the Hacker News item
hint.zh_Hans: 是否包含该 Hacker News 条目的完整评论树

tools.skill:
# hacker-news / get-hacker-news-article

Fetch a Hacker News item by ID and optionally include its comment tree.

## Input Parameters

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `article_id` | `string` | yes | `""` | Hacker News item ID to fetch. |
| `include_comments` | `boolean` | no | `false` | When `true`, includes the normalized comment tree for the item. |

### Example Input

```json
{
  "article_id": "8863",
  "include_comments": true
}
```

## Credential

- No credential is required.

## Success Output

```json
{
  "item": {
    "id": 8863,
    "type": "story",
    "title": "My YC app: Dropbox - Throw away your USB drive",
    "url": "http://www.getdropbox.com/u/2/screencast.html",
    "author": "dhouston",
    "created_at": "2007-04-04T19:16:40.000Z",
    "points": 104,
    "text": null,
    "parent_id": null,
    "children_count": 32
  },
  "comments": [
    {
      "id": 8865,
      "author": "dhouston",
      "text": "oh, and a mac port is coming :)",
      "created_at": "2007-04-04T19:22:55.000Z",
      "parent_id": 8863,
      "children_count": 1,
      "children": [
        {
          "id": 9007,
          "author": "vlad",
          "text": "Drew, this is awesome! All of the features you mentioned are exactly what people need.",
          "created_at": "2007-04-05T01:48:11.000Z",
          "parent_id": 8865,
          "children_count": 0,
          "children": []
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

### Output Notes

- `item` is always returned and contains normalized metadata for the requested Hacker News item.
- `comments` is only returned when `include_comments` is `true`.
- Comment entries are recursive and each child uses the same normalized shape.

tools.name: get-hacker-news-user

display_name.zh_Hans: 获取 Hacker News 用户

description.en_US: Fetch a Hacker News user profile by username
description.zh_Hans: 根据用户名获取 Algolia API 暴露的 Hacker News 用户字段

llm_description.en_US: The Hacker News username to fetch profile information for
llm_description.zh_Hans: 要获取 Algolia API 暴露用户字段的 Hacker News 用户名

hint.en_US: The Hacker News username to return
hint.zh_Hans: 要返回的 Hacker News 用户名

tools.skill:
# hacker-news / get-hacker-news-user

Fetch a Hacker News user profile by username through the Algolia API.

## Input Parameters

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `username` | `string` | yes | `""` | Hacker News username to fetch. |

### Example Input

```json
{
  "username": "pg"
}
```

## Credential

- No credential is required.

## Success Output

```json
{
  "user": {
    "username": "pg",
    "karma": 157316,
    "about": "Bug fixer."
  }
}
```

### Output Notes

- `user.username` is the normalized Hacker News username.
- `karma` and `about` may be `null` when the upstream API omits them.
